member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.AdapterRegistry
member.summary: Registry of all available protocol adapters for UPS routing. Supports initialization, diagnostics, configuration metadata, and thread-safe multi-transport resolution.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.AdapterRecord
member.summary: Holds runtime metadata for a protocol adapter instance.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.BaseUParamAdapter
member.summary: A fully semantic, contract-aware, async-capable UPS ↔ DTO mapper. This class serves as the foundation for all UPS DTO adapters and is designed for UPS v1.0+ and AVA's future agent-driven data flows.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.ContractAwareAdapter
member.summary: A contract-driven adapter that applies semantic UPS rules, defaults, domain type coercion, and strict/permissive mapping to and from DTOs. This class ensures DTO mappings fully align with the UPS contract.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.IUParamAdapter
member.summary: Converts between UPS UParams and strongly typed DTOs. Supports async operations, contract awareness, semantic type mapping, and strict/permissive transformation modes.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.IUParamAdapter.Parse``1(System.Collections.Generic.List{AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UParam})
member.summary: Converts a list of UPS parameters into a strongly typed DTO. Contract-independent (raw mapping).

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.IUParamAdapter.Build``1(``0)
member.summary: Converts a strongly typed DTO into a set of UPS parameters. Contract-independent (raw mapping).

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.IUParamAdapter.Parse``1(System.Collections.Generic.List{AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UParam},AVA.UPS.Adapter.Contracts.UPSMethodContract)
member.summary: Contract-aware DTO parsing with type enforcement and defaults. Populates fields according to UPSMethodContract semantics.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.IUParamAdapter.Build``1(``0,AVA.UPS.Adapter.Contracts.UPSMethodContract)
member.summary: Contract-aware DTO building that respects expected parameter keys, semantic types, and list-structured definitions.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.IUParamAdapter.ParseAsync``1(System.Collections.Generic.List{AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UParam})
member.summary: Async version of Parse for scenarios where value resolution requires IO (identity lookup, vector DB, remote DTO transforms, etc.)

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.IUParamAdapter.BuildAsync``1(``0)
member.summary: Async version of Build supporting remote resolution, identity routing, and semantic enrichment.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.IUParamAdapter.ParseAsync``1(System.Collections.Generic.List{AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UParam},AVA.UPS.Adapter.Contracts.UPSMethodContract)
member.summary: Contract-aware async parsing (full UPS lifecycle support).

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.IUParamAdapter.BuildAsync``1(``0,AVA.UPS.Adapter.Contracts.UPSMethodContract)
member.summary: Contract-aware async UPS parameter construction.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.IUParamAdapter.StrictMode
member.summary: StrictMode: true = DTO must match contract exactly (no missing fields, no extras). false = permissive mode, allowing partial DTOs and auto-coercions.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.IUParamAdapter.AutoMapIdentity
member.summary: When true, identity fields (Id, Handle, Type) are automatically mapped from DTO annotations or naming conventions.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.IUParamAdapter.AutoNormalizeEmbeddings
member.summary: When true, embedding arrays and lists are flattened/normalized automatically.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.IUParamAdapter.EnableNestedDTOs
member.summary: When true, DTO properties with nested objects will be converted into structured UParam blocks automatically.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Adapter.OpenAiInboundAdapter.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Maps model ID prefixes to their target module names. If modelId starts with a key, its value is the target module.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Contracts.ContractRegistry
member.summary: Central registry for all UPS JSON contract files. Handles loading, normalization, validation, and lookup.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Contracts.ContractRegistry.Modules
member.summary: Exposes all loaded contract modules. Keys are canonical module names.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Contracts.ContractRegistry.LoadFromDirectories(System.String[])
member.summary: Loads all UPS contract files from one or more directories. Supports deterministic ordering, module override rules, and full validation.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Contracts.ContractRegistry.LoadFromDirectory(System.String)
member.summary: Loads all JSON contract files from a single directory. Applies strict validation and normalization.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Contracts.ContractRegistry.GetMethodContract(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns the contract for a specific method within a module, or null if the module or method is not registered.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Contracts.UPSContractFile
member.summary: Root object for each module's JSON contract file.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Contracts.UPSMethodContract
member.summary: Represents a contract for a single method in a module. Contains its name, version, expected parameters, and return type.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Contracts.UPSParameterContract
member.summary: Defines a single expected parameter in a UPS method contract.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Contracts.UPSReturnContract
member.summary: Describes the full expected return schema of a UPS method. This is loaded from external contract definition files.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Dispatcher.DispatcherResult
member.summary: Represents the result of a UPS dispatch operation. Includes structured diagnostics, mismatch reporting, and correlation-aware metadata for UPS v1.0+ routing.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Dispatcher.DispatcherResult.Success
member.summary: True if the dispatch operation completed successfully.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Dispatcher.DispatcherResult.Payload
member.summary: The UParam payload returned by the invoked method or error handler. Always non-null.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Dispatcher.DispatcherResult.ErrorType
member.summary: Optional error type (e.g., ContractError, InvocationError, AdapterError). Useful for diagnostics, logging, and multi-agent UPS routing.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Dispatcher.DispatcherResult.Mismatches
member.summary: Detailed mismatch entries generated by contract validation or adapter-level type coercion reporting.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Dispatcher.DispatcherResult.Diagnostics
member.summary: Diagnostics metadata such as adapter used, execution time, method name, module, correlation id, or stack traces.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Dispatcher.DispatcherResult.CorrelationId
member.summary: Correlation ID from the UPS envelope for end-to-end tracing.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Dispatcher.MethodInvoker
member.summary: Reflection-based UPS method invoker supporting UPS v1.0+ signatures, diagnostics injection, correlation awareness, and structured error handling.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Dispatcher.ModuleDispatcher
member.summary: Executes UPS method calls inside the same process using reflection. Fully contract-aware, correlation-aware, and compatible with UPS v1.0+.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Gateway.IInboundAdapter.FormatName
member.summary: Unique name identifying this format. e.g. "ups-native", "openai", "raw"

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Gateway.IInboundAdapter.Priority
member.summary: Priority order for auto-detection. Lower number = checked first.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Gateway.IInboundAdapter.CanHandle(System.Byte[],System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Inspects raw bytes and headers to determine if this adapter can handle the incoming payload. Used for auto-detection when no format is explicitly specified.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Gateway.IInboundAdapter.TranslateAsync(System.Byte[],System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Translates raw inbound bytes into a UPSMessageEnvelope. This is the ONLY place format-specific inbound logic lives.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Gateway.IInboundAdapter.TranslateResponseAsync(AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSMessageEnvelope,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Translates a UPSMessageEnvelope response back into bytes in the format the caller expects. This is the ONLY place format-specific outbound response logic lives.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Gateway.InboundAdapterRegistry.Detect(System.Byte[],System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Inspects raw bytes and headers to find the first adapter that claims it can handle the payload, ordered by Priority. Returns null if no adapter matches.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Gateway.InboundAdapterRegistry.Resolve(System.Byte[],System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Resolves an adapter by explicit format name first. Falls back to auto-detection if format is null or unknown.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Gateway.UPSGateway.SendAsync(System.Byte[],System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Accepts any inbound payload as raw bytes. FormatHint is optional — if null auto-detection is used. Headers carry transport metadata, auth hints, routing hints. Returns raw bytes in the caller's expected format.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Handshake.UPSCompatibilityValidator
member.summary: Validates compatibility between two UPS handshake declarations.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Handshake.UPSHandshakeCapabilities
member.summary: Capability declaration exchanged by modules during handshake. Indicates supported transports, encodings, compression, etc.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Handshake.UPSHandshakeCapabilities.SupportedTransports
member.summary: Transport types and encodings supported by this module. Example: ["http", "grpc", "file", "s3"]

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Handshake.UPSHandshakeCapabilities.MaxPayloadBytes
member.summary: Maximum allowed payload size in bytes.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Handshake.UPSHandshakeError
member.summary: Error produced during handshake negotiation. Includes helper factories for common handshake failures.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Handshake.UPSHandshakeError.VersionMismatch(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a version mismatch error.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Handshake.UPSHandshakeError.CapabilityMismatch
member.summary: Creates a capability mismatch error.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Handshake.UPSHandshakeIdentity
member.summary: Declares identity information exchanged during handshake.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Handshake.UPSHandshakeIdentity.NodeId
member.summary: Unique ID for this machine or AVA instance.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Handshake.UPSHandshakeIdentity.ModuleName
member.summary: Module name (Vault, Memory, Agent, etc.).

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Handshake.UPSHandshakeIdentity.DisplayName
member.summary: Optional human-readable name.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Handshake.UPSHandshakeIdentity.Environment
member.summary: Operating system or environment details.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Handshake.UPSHandshakeIdentity.ModuleVersion
member.summary: Instance version of the module, used for compatibility checks.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Handshake.UPSHandshakeRequest
member.summary: Data sent by a module initiating a UPS handshake to another module.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Handshake.UPSHandshakeResponse
member.summary: Response returned by a remote module upon handshake.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Handshake.UPSHandshakeService
member.summary: Performs UPS handshake negotiation between two modules.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Handshake.UPSHandshakeService.BuildRequest(System.String,System.String,AVA.UPS.Adapter.Handshake.UPSHandshakeCapabilities,System.String)
member.summary: Builds a handshake request for the calling module.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Handshake.UPSHandshakeService.ValidateHandshake(AVA.UPS.Adapter.Handshake.UPSHandshakeRequest,System.String)
member.summary: Validates an incoming handshake request and returns host module identity + acceptance status.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Host.HttpUPSHostListener
member.summary: Bare-metal HTTP listener for UPS envelopes. Uses HttpListener (Windows-compatible), no ASP.NET Core required. POST /invoke → accepts UPSMessageEnvelope JSON and returns a UPSMessageEnvelope JSON.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Host.IUPSHostTransport
member.summary: Interface implemented by all UPS host listeners.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Host.UPSHost
member.summary: Core host for UPS. Creates dispatchers and runs listeners.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Host.UPSHostContext
member.summary: Context passed to all UPS host listeners on startup. Carries everything a listener needs to process inbound requests.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Host.UPSHostContext.ModuleInstance
member.summary: The module instance being hosted.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Host.UPSHostContext.Contract
member.summary: The UPS contract file defining all methods for this module.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Host.UPSHostContext.Dispatcher
member.summary: The dispatcher responsible for invoking module methods.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Host.UPSHostContext.Gateway
member.summary: The single UPS gateway entry point for all inbound traffic. All requests are routed through here regardless of format or transport.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Host.UPSHostContext.Options
member.summary: Configuration options for host behavior.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Host.UPSHostListener
member.summary: Base class for all UPS host listeners. Reads raw bytes from any transport stream and routes them through the UPSGateway — the single entry point for all inbound traffic.

member.name: F:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Host.UPSHostListener._Context
member.summary: The host context containing the gateway and options.

member.name: F:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Host.UPSHostListener._Gateway
member.summary: The single UPS gateway entry point.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Host.UPSHostListener.StartAsync(AVA.UPS.Adapter.Host.UPSHostContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Initializes the listener with the host context.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Host.UPSHostListener.StopAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Stops the listener.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Host.UPSHostListener.HandleRequestAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.IO.Stream,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads raw bytes from the input stream, routes through the gateway, and writes the response bytes to the output stream. This is the only request handling logic — format agnostic.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Host.UPSHostListener.FormatHint
member.summary: Override to provide a format hint from transport-specific metadata. For example HTTP Content-Type header, TCP frame prefix, pipe handshake. Returns null to use auto-detection.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Host.UPSHostListener.ExtractHeaders
member.summary: Override to extract transport-specific headers or metadata and pass them to the gateway for adapter detection and routing hints.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Host.UPSHostOptions
member.summary: Configuration for UPS host behavior.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Host.UPSHostOptions.MaxPayloadBytes
member.summary: Maximum allowed payload size.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.ChatGPTAdapter
member.summary: ILLMAdapter for ChatGPT-style OpenAI chat completions endpoints.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.ChatGPTAdapter.#ctor(AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMAdapterConfig,System.Net.Http.HttpClient)
member.summary: Initializes a ChatGPT adapter from a normalized config bag.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.ClaudeAdapter
member.summary: ILLMAdapter for Anthropic Claude. POST /v1/messages with x-api-key and anthropic-version headers.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.ClaudeAdapter.#ctor(AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMAdapterConfig,System.Net.Http.HttpClient)
member.summary: Initializes the adapter from a config bag.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.DeepSeekAdapter
member.summary: ILLMAdapter for DeepSeek chat completions endpoints.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.DeepSeekAdapter.#ctor(AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMAdapterConfig,System.Net.Http.HttpClient)
member.summary: Initializes a DeepSeek adapter from a normalized config bag.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.ILLMAdapter
member.summary: Common contract for all LLM provider adapters in AVA. Implementations exist for Anthropic (Claude), OpenAI-compatible endpoints (ChatGPT, DeepSeek, Venice)

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.ILLMAdapter.ProviderId
member.summary: Unique provider identifier used for routing (e.g. "anthropic", "openai").

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.ILLMAdapter.DisplayName
member.summary: Human-readable display name shown in the UI.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.ILLMAdapter.ModelName
member.summary: Active model identifier (e.g. "claude-sonnet-4-20250514"). Sourced from LLMProfile at runtime.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.ILLMAdapter.ConnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Establishes connectivity and verifies the API key is valid.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.ILLMAdapter.SendAsync(AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSPayload,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a prompt and returns the provider response wrapped in a UPSResponse.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.ILLMAdapter.TestAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a lightweight test prompt and measures latency.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.ILLMAdapter.DisconnectAsync
member.summary: Releases any held resources (HTTP clients, connections).

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.ILLMAdapter.GetCapabilitiesAsync
member.summary: Returns the capabilities reported by this provider.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMConnectionResult
member.summary: Result of a ConnectAsync call.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMConnectionResult.IsSuccess
member.summary: Whether the connection succeeded.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMConnectionResult.Message
member.summary: Human-readable status message.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMConnectionResult.ConnectedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp of the successful connection.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMTestResult
member.summary: Result of a TestAsync call.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMTestResult.IsSuccess
member.summary: Whether the test prompt succeeded.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMTestResult.Message
member.summary: Human-readable status or error message.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMTestResult.LatencyMs
member.summary: Round-trip latency in milliseconds.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMCapabilitySet
member.summary: Capability information returned by the provider.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMCapabilitySet.MaxTokens
member.summary: Maximum output tokens supported.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMCapabilitySet.MaxTemperature
member.summary: Maximum temperature value accepted.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMCapabilitySet.SupportsStreaming
member.summary: Whether streaming responses are supported.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMCapabilitySet.SystemPromptCapabilities
member.summary: Supported system prompt modes.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMAdapterConfig
member.summary: All configuration an ILLMAdapter needs to connect and send. Populated by UPSClientService from LLMProfile + ModelProfile.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMAdapterConfig.ProfileId
member.summary: Unique identifier for this profile+model combination.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMAdapterConfig.ProfileName
member.summary: Human-readable profile name (e.g. "My Claude Profile").

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMAdapterConfig.Provider
member.summary: Resolved provider name (e.g. "Anthropic", "OpenAI", "DeepSeek").

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMAdapterConfig.Endpoint
member.summary: Base endpoint URL. Adapters append path suffixes as needed.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMAdapterConfig.ApiKey
member.summary: API key or bearer token.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMAdapterConfig.CustomHeadersAsText
member.summary: Custom headers as raw text (Key=Value, one per line).

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMAdapterConfig.ModelId
member.summary: Model identifier (e.g. "claude-sonnet-4-20250514", "gpt-4o").

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMAdapterConfig.ModelLabel
member.summary: Human-readable model label.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMAdapterConfig.Temperature
member.summary: Temperature — model override if set, else profile default.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMAdapterConfig.MaxTokens
member.summary: Max tokens — model override if set, else profile default.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMAdapterConfig.SystemPrompt
member.summary: Optional system prompt for this model.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.OpenAiCompatibleAdapter
member.summary: ILLMAdapter for any OpenAI-compatible endpoint. One class handles ChatGPT, DeepSeek, Venice, and any other provider that implements /v1/chat/completions.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.OpenAiCompatibleAdapter.#ctor(AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMAdapterConfig,System.Net.Http.HttpClient)
member.summary: Initializes the adapter from a config bag.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.VeniceAdapter
member.summary: ILLMAdapter for Venice chat completions endpoints.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.VeniceAdapter.#ctor(AVA.UPS.Adapter.LLMAdapters.LLMAdapterConfig,System.Net.Http.HttpClient)
member.summary: Initializes a Venice adapter from a normalized config bag.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Logging.UPSDiagnosticEvent
member.summary: High-level diagnostic events emitted by routing, dispatching, and host listeners. Suitable for logging, telemetry, monitoring, and distributed tracing.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Logging.UPSDiagnosticEvent.Metadata
member.summary: Structured diagnostic fields: adapter info, bytes sent, response time, etc.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Logging.UPSMessageTrace
member.summary: Represents the lifecycle trace of a UPSMessageEnvelope, including routing, dispatch, errors, and timing.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Logging.UPSMessageTrace.Transport
member.summary: Transport used for routing (http, mqtt, tcp, etc.)

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Logging.UPSMessageTrace.Diagnostics
member.summary: Diagnostics collected from routing + host + dispatch.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Logging.UPSMessageTrace.ErrorCode
member.summary: Optional error info captured during any stage.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Logging.UPSTransmissionLog
member.summary: Transport-level transmission log for a single UPS request/response pair. Captures metadata useful for analytics, reliability testing, and debugging.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Logging.UPSTransmissionLog.Metrics
member.summary: Additional structured metrics: retries, adapter timings, etc.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSError
member.summary: A standard UPS error object that can be wrapped into a UParam with type "upsError".

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSMessageEnvelope
member.summary: Standardized envelope for UPS messages, including payload, routing metadata, identity information, and diagnostics.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSMessageEnvelope.ID
member.summary: Canonical UPS envelope identifier. MUST always be 'ID' to match UPS routing, registry, and persistence layers.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSMessageEnvelope.CorrelationId
member.summary: Optional correlation ID for request/response workflows.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSMessageEnvelope.Source
member.summary: Name of the calling module (e.g., "VaultService", "AgentCore", "MemoryBroker").

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSMessageEnvelope.Target
member.summary: Name of the target module (must match a key in UPSModuleRegistry).

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSMessageEnvelope.TargetMethod
member.summary: Name of the target module (must match a key in UPSModuleRegistry).

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSMessageEnvelope.IdentityIdPrimary
member.summary: The primary identity issuing this message.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSMessageEnvelope.IdentityHandlePrimary
member.summary: The human-readable identity handle (username, service ID).

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSMessageEnvelope.IdentityTypePrimary
member.summary: Indicates identity type ("User", "Service", "Agent", etc.).

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSMessageEnvelope.IdentityList
member.summary: Extended/secondary identities (multi-tenant, multi-agent, delegates, etc.).

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSMessageEnvelope.Payload
member.summary: The UPS payload (UParams) transmitted between modules.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSMessageEnvelope.Timestamp
member.summary: Timestamp for tracking message creation.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSMessageEnvelope.Error
member.summary: Optional envelope-level error info.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSMessageEnvelope.ReplyTo
member.summary: Optional destination for response envelopes.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSResponse
member.summary: Standardized response from any module or transport layer. Always wraps List<UParam>, even for errors.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSResponse.Success
member.summary: Whether the request completed successfully.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSResponse.Payload
member.summary: Structured UPS payload returned by the provider or module.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSResponse.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Error message when the request fails.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSResponse.Content
member.summary: Convenience string content set directly by LLM adapters. Avoids callers needing to walk the Payload list for simple text responses.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSResponse.ModelId
member.summary: Model profile ID that produced this response. Set by LLM adapters so broadcast callers can correlate responses to models.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSResponse.ProviderResponse
member.summary: Raw provider response body captured for diagnostics.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSResponse.RespondedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the provider response was received.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSPayload
member.summary: Lightweight outbound payload model used by the UI services.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSPayload.Content
member.summary: Request content to send to the target model.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSPayload.Headers
member.summary: Optional request headers or routing hints.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Models.UPSPayload.FormatHint
member.summary: Expected content format.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.UPSProtocol
member.summary: Central definition of the UPS protocol version. This is the only place where the protocol version is defined.

member.name: F:AVA.UPS.Adapter.UPSProtocol.Version
member.summary: Current UPS protocol version. Bump this only when the UPS message contract or handshake rules change.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Registry.UPSModuleDiscovery
member.summary: Discovers UPS modules from JSON configuration files, environment variables, directory scans, and future distributed sources.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Registry.UPSModuleDiscovery.LoadFromJsonFile(System.String,AVA.UPS.Adapter.Routing.UPSModuleRegistry)
member.summary: Loads module definitions from a single JSON file. Adds them into the registry with discovery metadata.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Registry.UPSModuleDiscovery.LoadFromDirectory(System.String,AVA.UPS.Adapter.Routing.UPSModuleRegistry)
member.summary: Loads all *.json files from a directory, applying layered config loading.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Registry.UPSModuleDiscovery.LoadFromEnvironment(AVA.UPS.Adapter.Routing.UPSModuleRegistry)
member.summary: Loads modules from environment variables: UPS_MODULES = "VaultService|http://host:9000, Identity|grpc://host:5001"

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Registry.UPSModuleDiscoveryFile
member.summary: Helper model for JSON discovery file deserialization.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Routing.UPSModuleRegistry
member.summary: Central registry of all UPS-enabled modules known to this process. Tracks discovery metadata, diagnostics, and routing information.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Routing.UPSModuleRecord
member.summary: Runtime metadata for a registry entry.
Runtime metadata for a registry entry.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Routing.UPSModuleInfo
member.summary: Declarative metadata for a UPS-capable module.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Routing.UPSRouteDecision
member.summary: The resolved route for a UPS message. Includes target module, transport, endpoint, and timestamp.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Routing.UPSRouteDiagnostics
member.summary: Mutable dictionary-style diagnostics object. Used by ProtocolRouter and UPSRoutingService for tracing routing flow.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Transport.IProtocolAdapter
member.summary: A dynamically provided protocol adapter used by UPS routing. Implementations are supplied by the host module.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Transport.IProtocolAdapter.InitializeAsync(System.Object)
member.summary: Optional config object passed in by the host module.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Transport.IProtocolAdapter.SendAsync(System.Byte[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a serialized UPS envelope to the external protocol.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Utils.UParamFactory
member.summary: Factory helpers for building strongly typed UParams. Fully DUAS-compliant and compatible with ContractValidator + BaseUParamAdapter.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Utils.UPSIdComposer
member.summary: Composes a distributed-swarm-safe ID using timestamp + nodeId + moduleId + processId + sequence + random salt.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Utils.UPSIdGenerator
member.summary: UPS ID Generator that consumes Identity layer information to produce globally unique, swarm-safe identifiers for UPS message envelopes.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Utils.UPSIdGenerator.NewEnvelopeId
member.summary: Generates the primary unique ID for a UPSMessageEnvelope.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Utils.UPSIdGenerator.NewCorrelationId(System.String)
member.summary: Generates a correlation ID with a specific prefix (e.g. REQ-xxxxx).

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Utils.UPSIdGenerator.NewHopId
member.summary: Generates a short hop-level trace ID (router/debug).

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Utils.UPSJsonLoader
member.summary: Loads and deserializes JSON files using UPS-standard settings.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Utils.UPSJsonSerializer
member.summary: Central JSON serializer for all UPS components. Ensures consistent JSON formatting across modules and transports. Adds byte[] support for DUAS adapter routing.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Utils.UPSReflectionExtensions
member.summary: Reflection helpers for discovering UPS-compatible methods.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Utils.UPSReflectionExtensions.GetUPSMethod(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Gets a UPS method by name (case-insensitive).

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Validation.ContractValidationResult
member.summary: Represents the full result of validating a UPS call against its contract. Includes human-readable errors AND structured mismatch diagnostics.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Validation.ContractValidationResult.IsValid
member.summary: True when no errors or mismatches were detected.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Validation.ContractValidationResult.Errors
member.summary: Human-readable errors for quick debugging.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Validation.ContractValidationResult.Mismatches
member.summary: Structured mismatch entries for deep inspection and automated correction.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Validation.ContractValidationResult.ExpectedContract
member.summary: The expected method contract.

member.name: P:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Validation.ContractValidationResult.ReceivedParameters
member.summary: The received UParams from the UPS envelope. Always non-null for safe reporting.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Validation.ContractValidationResult.ToUPS(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Converts this validation result into a standardized UPS error payload. Includes both human-readable messages AND structured mismatch data.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Validation.ContractMismatchDetail
member.summary: Represents a single structured mismatch detected during contract validation. Enables precise diagnostics and future self-repair behaviors.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Validation.ContractValidator
member.summary: Validates incoming UPS parameters against a method contract. Generates human-readable errors AND structured mismatch diagnostics.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Validation.StandardUPSErrors
member.summary: Static factory for generating standardized UPS error responses.

member.name: T:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Validation.UParamTypeChecker
member.summary: Provides UPS-wide semantic type validation. Fully supports primitives, lists, identity, embeddings, domain-specific types, and a pluggable type registry.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Validation.UParamTypeChecker.RegisterType(System.String,System.Func{System.Object,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Registers a custom semantic type checker. Module adaptors may extend UPS types dynamically.

member.name: M:AVA.UPS.Adapter.Validation.UParamTypeChecker.UnregisterType(System.String)
member.summary: Removes a registered semantic type checker.
